chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Cr. Jail Appeal No.D-51 of 2019 Cr. Conf. Case No.D-25 of 2019 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.04.2023. 1. For orders on M.A. No.1846/2023. 2. For orders on M.A. No.1847/2023. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P.G. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. The applicant by way of listed application has sought for payment of Diyat money under her share, which is deposited with the Accountant of this Court, which is not opposed by learned Addl. P.G. Office is directed to pay Diyat money to the applicant under her share, with profit, if any, by way of Payee’s Cheque. Listed application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
